title: Attendance
permissionDeniedCamera: Camera permission denied. Enable it in browser settings.
permissionDeniedLocation: Location permission denied. Enable GPS to punch.
punchSubmitFailed: Failed to submit attendance. Please try again.
autoClosed: A past open session was auto-closed
autoClosedToast: We auto-closed your forgotten check-out from {{dates}}. Please remember to check out at end of day.
rawPunchesHint: Raw clock / manual punches for the selected day
trialExpiredPunch: Your trial has expired. Please upgrade to continue punching attendance.
accountSuspendedPunch: Your account is suspended. Please contact support.
trialExpiredToast: Your trial has expired. Please upgrade to continue punching attendance.
accountSuspendedToast: Your account is suspended. Please contact support.
trialExpiredBanner: Your trial has expired. Punching is read-only until you upgrade.
accountSuspendedBanner: Your account is suspended. Punching is blocked.
factoryRemarksRequired: Mandatory: please mention the factory name and details in remarks.
locationHelpAndroid2: Go to Settings > Apps > Chrome (or the app name)
locationHelpAndroid4: If using PWA: also check Settings > Apps > RH_Eletropasso > Permissions > Location
locationHelpAndroid5: Return to the app and tap Retry
locationHelpIos1: Open Settings > Privacy & Security > Location Services and turn it ON
locationHelpIos2: Scroll down and tap Safari Websites (or the PWA name)
locationHelpIos4: Return to the app and tap Retry
locationHelpDesktop1: Click the lock/tune icon in the address bar
locationHelpTip: Tip: If location still doesn't work, try turning Wi-Fi ON — it helps with indoor positioning.

errors.photoFailed: Failed to take photo. Please try again.
errors.selectPhotoFailed: Failed to select photo. Please try again.
errors.locationDeniedPwa: Location blocked. Open your device Settings > Apps > find this app > Permissions > Location > Allow.
errors.locationDeniedBrowser: Location permission denied. Please tap the lock icon in your browser address bar and allow Location access, then retry.
errors.locationUnavailableDetail: Location unavailable. Please ensure Location/GPS is turned ON in your device Settings and you are not in airplane mode.
errors.locationTimeout: Location timed out. Please move to an area with better GPS signal or turn on Wi-Fi for faster location detection, then retry.
errors.locationGeneric: Could not detect location. Please check that Location is enabled in your device Settings and try again.

searchPlaceholder: Search by name, date or status…
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this attendance record?
confirmDeleteLog: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this record?
